description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically across the facades, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, complemented by landscaped green areas with palm trees and a small garden at the front. There is a driveway leading to a garage, a spacious outdoor patio, and a swimming pool at the rear. The layout includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as a rooftop terrace and a shaded patio area. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, clean lines, and integration with outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, a garage, and a swimming pool, featuring open outdoor spaces and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and landscaped garden with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a portion of the backyard with palm trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, rooftop terrace, and extensive greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, pool, and additional green space with palm trees.
